```
  - CF-804: Only GLOBAL-scoped patterns returned — never tenant-specific
  - Optionally filters by patternType
  - DNA-3: Returns DataProcessResult with pattern array
```

## T603 — PHILOSOPHY PATTERN SUMMARIZER
```
TASK TYPE: T603
NAME: PhilosophyPatternSummarizer
ARCHETYPE: DATA_PIPELINE
FLOW: FLOW-45
FABRICS: DATABASE, QUEUE
PURPOSE: Group retrieved ARCH_PATTERN records by patternType and produce summaries.
  Stores to xiigen-philosophy-summaries.

IRON RULES:
  - DNA-7: Idempotent per summarizationRunId
  - DNA-8: storeDocument(summary) BEFORE enqueue(SummaryReady)
```

## T604 — HISTORY BOOTSTRAP ORCHESTRATOR
```
TASK TYPE: T604
NAME: HistoryBootstrapOrchestrator
ARCHETYPE: ORCHESTRATION
FLOW: FLOW-45
FABRICS: DATABASE, QUEUE
PURPOSE: Orchestrate full pipeline: seed patterns → retrieve → summarize → store completion.

IRON RULES:
  - DNA-7: Idempotent per bootstrapRunId
  - DNA-8: storeDocument to xiigen-bootstrap-completions BEFORE enqueue
  - Pipeline: T601 → T602 → T603 → completion record
```

---

# ═══ FLOW-15..24 REMAPPED TASK TYPES (NestJS Implementation) ═══
# These flows used T221-T366 in design docs but were remapped to T605-T649
# due to collisions with existing contracts. See contracts at:
# server/src/engine-contracts/{slug}-contracts.ts

## FLOW-15 (saas-multi-tenancy): T605-T608
```
T605: TenantProvisioningOrchestrator   [ORCHESTRATION] — create tenant environment
T606: TenantConfigurationManager       [VALIDATION]     — FREEDOM config per tenant, OCC
T607: TenantQuotaMaterializer          [DATA_PIPELINE]  — allocate resource quotas
T608: TenantLifecycleManager           [ORCHESTRATION]  — activate/suspend/deactivate
```

## FLOW-16 (marketplace-payments): T609-T612
```
T609: MarketplaceCheckoutGateway       [VALIDATION]     — checkout validation, inventory OCC
T610: MarketplacePaymentSplitter       [BILLING]        — platform commission splits
T611: MarketplaceEscrowController      [ORCHESTRATION]  — escrow state: HELD→RELEASED→REFUNDED
T612: SellerPayoutWriter               [DATA_PIPELINE]  — scheduled seller payouts
```

## FLOW-17 (freelancer-marketplace): T613-T616
```
T613: GigAcceptanceLockGateway         [VALIDATION]     — SETNX lock for gig assignment
T614: MilestoneContractManager         [TRANSACTION]    — milestone-based contracts, OCC
T615: DeliveryGateEscrowController     [ORCHESTRATION]  — delivery verification + escrow release
T616: FreelancerReviewWriter           [DATA_PIPELINE]  — freelancer review collection
```

## FLOW-18 (visual-flow-engine): T617-T620
```
T617: FlowCanvasWriter                 [VISUAL_CREATION] — canvas creation with node positions
T618: FlowPublicationOrchestrator      [ORCHESTRATION]   — DRAFT→PUBLISHED with OCC
T619: NodeTypeRegistrar                [VALIDATION]      — custom node type registration
T620: CodeInjectionProcessor           [CODE_INJECTION]  — custom logic injection into nodes
```

## FLOW-19 (durable-sagas-compliance): T621-T624
```
T621: SagaOrchestrator                 [ORCHESTRATION]  — multi-step saga with checkpoints
T622: CompensationEngine               [DATA_PIPELINE]  — compensation actions on failure
T623: ComplianceAuditWriter            [DATA_PIPELINE]  — immutable audit trail
T624: DataRetentionEnforcer            [DATA_PIPELINE]  — retention policy enforcement
```

## FLOW-20 (ads-platform): T625-T628
```
T625: ConsentGateEnforcer              [GUARD]          — GDPR/CCPA consent enforcement
T626: AuctionBidProcessor              [REQUEST_RESPONSE] — real-time bid auctions

```

```
T633: ContentVersionPublisher          [STATE_MACHINE]  — DRAFT→PUBLISHED with OCC

T635: ContentScheduleDispatcher        [ORCHESTRATION]  — scheduled publication
```

## FLOW-23 (form-builder-templates): T637-T649 (13 services)
```
T637: TemplateSchemaValidator          [VALIDATION]     — JSON Schema validation
T638: TemplateVersionPublisher         [ORCHESTRATION]  — version publication with OCC
T639: TemplateInstantiationEngine      [DATA_PIPELINE]  — template instantiation with SETNX lock
T640: TemplateUsageAnalytics           [DATA_PIPELINE]  — PII-free usage metrics

T642: TemplateModeRender               [COMPUTATION]    — read-only preview rendering

T644: DynamicDataSlotResolve           [DATA_PIPELINE]  — JSONPath slot resolution

T648: PermissionEnforcer               [GOVERNANCE]     — role from auth context only (OWASP API1)
```

```
T371: PersonalizedLessonScheduler      [ORCHESTRATION]  — FREEDOM-gated AI scheduling

T373: CalendarSyncConnectorGate        [ORCHESTRATION]  — FREEDOM-gated calendar (F1018, DD-225)
T374: AdvancedProgressTracker          [DATA_PIPELINE]  — FREEDOM-gated progress tracking
```
